title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at DTDC - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at DTDC - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at DTDC. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Distribution Manager to strengthen our Meerut-based team.

About DTDC:
DTDC is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with DTDC!
